Heaven is for Real (2014)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $91,386,097Details
International Box Office $9,527,459
Worldwide Box Office $100,913,556
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $33,887,494
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $11,444,901
Total $45,332,395
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The true story of a small-town father who must find the courage and conviction to share his son’s extraordinary, life-changing experience with the world.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$22,522,221 (24.6% of total gross)
Legs:4.06 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:90.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 8.4 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,417 opening theaters/3,048 max. theaters, 6.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $133,779,405

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 16th, 2014 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: April 16th, 2014 (Wide) (Poland)
April 17th, 2014 (Wide) (Hong Kong)
April 17th, 2014 (Wide) (New Zealand)
May 1st, 2014 (Wide) (Portugal)
May 9th, 2014 (Wide) (South Africa)
Video Release: July 22nd, 2014 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for thematic material including some medical situations.
(Rating bulletin 2303, 12/24/2013)
Running Time: 100 minutes
Plot point: Christians, Money Troubles, Near Death Experience, Religious, Religious Extremism
Source material: Based on an UNTRUE Story
Subgenre: Faith-Based Drama
Target audience: Faith-Based Film
Source:Based on Factual Book/Article
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization
Production/Financing Companies: Roth Films, T.D. Jakes
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

The true story of a small-town father who must find the courage and conviction to share his son’s extraordinary, life-changing experience with the world.

Opening Weekend:$22,522,221 (24.6% of total gross)
